grant_title: Bridging the gap: Addressing health inequities in rural communities
geographic_restrictions: Rural communities in the United States
project_area: Healthcare access and equity in rural areas, including telehealth initiatives, provider shortages, and hospital closures
demographic_requirements: Targeted at underserved rural populations facing healthcare disparities, including low-income individuals, those with limited transportation, and communities with high poverty rates
eligibility_summary: Open to healthcare providers, community organizations, policymakers, local governments, and non-profits working to address health inequities in rural America through innovative solutions such as telehealth, stakeholder engagement, and grassroots initiatives.
